name: Stinging Nettle Tagliatelle with Hot Sausage
recipeIngredient: 8 ounces spicy Italian sausage with fennel seeds, cut into 1/4-inch pieces
1/2 pound kale, finely chopped, to yield 4 cups
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring 6 quarts of water to a boil in a large pot and add 2 tablespoons salt.
2. In a 10-inch to 12-inch sauté pan, cook sausage over low heat until fat begins to render, about 6 minutes. Increase the heat to medium and cook until most of the fat has rendered out and the sausage is golden brown. Add kale and chicken stock and cook until very soft, about 2 to 3 minutes. Season with salt and pepper.
3. Drop the pasta into boiling water and cook until tender (about 1 minute). Drain the pasta and toss it into the sauté pan with kale and sausage. Cook over high heat until coated, about 1 minute. Add grated cheese and toss to mix. Pour into a heated serving bowl and serve.
Yield: 4 servings
